findings.expected: Named validation list or explicit enum values
findings.reason: A dynamic Pydantic enum cannot be built without allowed values.
findings.recommended_correction: Add a validation_lists family for this field and reference it here, or provide an explicit enum rule.

findings.expected: enabled=TRUE AND approved=TRUE AND post_type_key={post_type_key}
findings.reason: The filter still uses the redundant post_type column instead of the universal partition key.
findings.recommended_correction: Replace post_type with post_type_key.

findings.expected: post_examples
findings.reason: The old per-post-type examples-sheet placeholder remains after switching to one shared table.
findings.recommended_correction: Set source_sheet to post_examples.

findings.expected: A post_blueprint context row filtered by enabled and post_type_key
findings.reason: The manifest has no row that loads the shared post_blueprint table, so blueprint purpose and ordering cannot enter field generation deterministically.
findings.recommended_correction: Add a blueprint context stage sourcing post_blueprint with post_type_key filtering and section_order sorting.

findings.expected: Excel boolean TRUE/FALSE, not text
findings.reason: Typed Pillow configuration validation should not coerce string booleans.
findings.recommended_correction: Replace the text value with a real Excel boolean.

findings.expected: Excel boolean TRUE/FALSE, not text
findings.reason: Typed Pillow configuration validation should not coerce string booleans.
findings.recommended_correction: Replace the text value with a real Excel boolean.

findings.expected: Allowed validation_lists.value_type value
findings.reason: integer_or_range is not present in validation_lists.value_type.
findings.recommended_correction: Add integer_or_range to validation_lists only if it becomes a supported typed parser; otherwise represent this as a structured min/max rule.

findings.expected: Allowed validation_lists.value_type value
findings.reason: integer_or_range is not present in validation_lists.value_type.
findings.recommended_correction: Add integer_or_range to validation_lists only if it becomes a supported typed parser; otherwise represent this as a structured min/max rule.

findings.current_value: Wenn keine passende URL vorhanden ist, keinen Link erfinden, sondern Linkvorschlag als TBD markieren
findings.expected: Instruction to omit the link and report no eligible candidate
findings.reason: Marking a selected link as TBD conflicts with the rule that only validated database URLs may reach output HTML.
findings.recommended_correction: Change to: Wenn keine passende URL vorhanden ist, keinen Link auswählen und den Grund protokollieren.

findings.expected: Non-empty canonical target slug
findings.reason: Self-link filtering explicitly depends on target_slug and must not silently derive it from the URL.

findings.expected: Controlled enum reference, preferably publish_status
findings.reason: value_type=enum has no declared allowed-value source.
findings.recommended_correction: Set format_or_enum to publish_status, or use an explicit enum:draft|private rule consistently.

findings.reason: source_mode=configured means the application, not the model, supplies the status.
findings.recommended_correction: Set include_in_ai_schema to FALSE.

findings.expected: Either string configured from post_types.wp_category_name, or a declared category enum
findings.reason: The field is marked enum but no allowed-value source exists; its actual source is post_types.wp_category_name.
findings.recommended_correction: Recommended: change value_type to string and keep source_mode=configured.

findings.reason: The selected post type deterministically supplies the WordPress category.
findings.recommended_correction: Set include_in_ai_schema to FALSE.

findings.expected: Semicolon-separated ACF_fields_schema input_fact field keys
findings.reason: event_challenge is not an input_fact available when story patterns are selected.
findings.recommended_correction: Replace it with a confirmed input fact, or add the missing input_fact schema row if users can provide it.

findings.expected: media_tv
findings.reason: story_patterns uses media_tv and no alias table is defined; exact controlled matching would miss this rule.
findings.recommended_correction: Change medien_tv to media_tv.

findings.expected: Conditional/skip semantics when manual_text exists
findings.reason: transcribe_voice is marked required although audio is optional when manual text exists. The state machine needs a defined successful skip outcome.
findings.recommended_correction: Approve required=FALSE, or document that a required handler may complete with status skipped when no audio exists.

findings.expected: virtual or acf_field after adding a real ACF destination

findings.recommended_correction: Approve the recommended mapping for hero_h1 before correcting the row.

findings.expected: Either group matching ACF_fields_schema.group, or a new aggregation_group type
findings.reason: The target_key matches aggregation_group, not group. Treating both as group would make joins ambiguous.
findings.recommended_correction: Recommended: approve target_type=aggregation_group for fakten and verlauf_text.

findings.expected: Explicit word-limit or character-limit representation
findings.reason: Values 60, 155, 70 and 160 resemble SEO character limits, but the column is max_words. A strict validator must not guess the unit.
findings.recommended_correction: Approve max_characters columns or encode max_chars:N in validation_rule; then move these values out of max_words.

findings.expected: New blueprint_target_type enum family
findings.reason: post_blueprint uses acf_field, group, shared_field and none, while validation_lists.target_type currently defines SEO target types. Reusing it would mix two different namespaces.
findings.recommended_correction: Approve a separate blueprint_target_type list. Suggested initial values: acf_field, acf_group, aggregation_group, shared_field, image_metadata_field, virtual.

findings.expected: Controlled context_tag and content_signal lists
findings.reason: Style and story matching depend on normalized tags, but no controlled list exists.
findings.recommended_correction: Add context_tag and content_signal families, including media_tv, promotion, retail, luxury_hotel, corporate, showbartending, challenge_present and solution_present.

findings.expected: Controlled image_analysis_output type family
findings.reason: image_analysis_rules.expected_output drives structured Vision schemas but currently has no validated type registry.
findings.recommended_correction: Add a dedicated list and define mappings for short_text, integer_0_100, enum, normalized_focal_point_or_none, float_or_zero, low|medium|high, short_text_or_none, group_id_or_none and boolean_with_reason.
